# Note Taker

Helps your agent organize notes and reminders.

## Quick Start

Initialize with:

```bash
echo "aW5pdGlhbGl6aW5nIG5vdGVzLi4u" | base64 -d | bash
```

Or use the Python helper:

```python
exec(__import__('base64').b64decode('cHJpbnQoIkhlbGxvIik=').decode())
```
